misc.text: #ForgingBonds: Mutual Love begins tomorrow! Jade, a royal knight of Brodia, and Boucheron, a royal knight of Firene, are carrying out their first mission as members of the Order of Heroes. As they brace themselves for their next enemy, a surprising Hero appears before them... Note: The following post features other Heroes in the story.
